reviews.review_title: Umm I boosted in discord and need stuff
reviews.review_description: Yh

Only gave this game 5 stars so it would be at the front, this might be the worst game i have ever played, even out of vr like you cant even play the game... you have to have 20 players to start which never happens as theres not enough people playing the game.. like what kind of feature is that.. and if you do wait about 10 mins to get into a game its about a 30 percent chance you actually get to play as most times you just get stuck under the map. No wonder the dev had to lie about his pc being broken to delay the game.. this game is dissapointing i cant beleive how bad it is

developer_response.body:
We are so sorry to hear that you do not enjoy the game! The game is currently in beta stages please give us a couple of days and trust the process, once again so sorry.

-PHOZE

reviews.review_description: The concept of the game was a really good idea and when I first heard about it I thought this will do very well if executed correctly… the owner tried to get investors and I was potentially going to invest in this game but I think I can happily say I did the right thing and not invest, the game has been executed very poorly, low poly maps, a motion sickness animation when the game starts…. And very buggy as in that bad you can’t play and enjoy the game.  In my opinion the only way for this game to succeed he will have to join up with other developers to have any chance of making this game successful, I know he will reply and say the game is in beta….. if that’s the case should of been kept for testers to test so it can all could be smoothed out. I wouldn’t recommend the game to anyone the moment but who knows  maybe give it a few months and it might change but if you get motion sickness be careful when the game starts it’s really bad….. gets 2/5 stars only because I think the idea is good idea but been done very poorly!!!

developer_response.body:
Hello ARMO,

I am sorry you did not enjoy the game!

Please remember we are in the beta stages at the moment and in the next couple of week bugs and games are being worked on! Sorry to hear you don't enjoy it.

-PHOZE

reviews.review_description: If you want to feel like your being force fed ai slop through a feeding tube play this game "edit" how can you have the balls to tell me *this game is not made with ai the only thing I used ai for is the text to speech* while the logo and the beginning cutscenes obviously use ai code, instead of lying to people try improving on the dumpster fire my grandma could make in 2 hours

developer_response.body:
Hello BernardDinglenut!

I am sorry to hear you did not enjoy the game, I can ensure you this game was made by me and no AI for code was used.

The logo was made by someone I hired off Fiverr, so I have no idea if it is AI or not.

The cutscene is not AI and is a camera that turns down, left then right what was just coded to rotate and made by me.

Once again I am sorry to know you did not enjoy the game.

-PHOZE

reviews.review_description:
Just to let everyone know the game is still in beta and is still currently being worked on however people wanted the game to be released and kept begging and we did warn them it will be very buggy. The creator is still working on the game and making sure it’s bug free. Games take time to be made so stop hating on a game that’s in early stages of development and being made by 1 singular man. if you find any more bugs in the game you can Join the Discord (https://discord.gg/virtualtrials) to report it and to see the games progress and future updates! 

Be Patient with the game’s Development
-Unc Vahs?

For the people who keep giving negative reviews, the game came out 50 MINUTES AGO. it is very buggy but they are getting fixed. Install this game most of these people are little kids who are impatient.

I know that this game is a beta or whatever but if u dont want to waste your time dont play it all you do is wait and hope that theres 20 people in your server so u can finally play. And after 20 minutes of waiting for the game to start i get glitched and it just kicked me out the game. Do not play its a waste of time wait for later updates to play
Terrible graphics and can't even load into the games. I expected it to be so good but this is one of the worst games ive played.

I was flung out the map and could not play anything
 even when i reset it was flung again

Wow you guys are honestly absurd, the game has just dropped. There will be bugs every game isnt perfect like calm down just let it cook and maybe it will be fun. Watch, as soon as part 2 of season 2 squid game dropped everyone will be adicted to squid game and they will think about playing it in vr
Mark my words when part 2 of season two drops this will blow up, But dev kewp up the work

This game was intended to release in January, now that it's out in march it's extremely buggy. I have never gone past red light green light due to bugs. Also this game has overpriced cosmetics as well as an opening cut scene that gives me motion sickness every time. The developer also tried to get "investors" which have definitely wasted their money because this game will not make any money. This game needs to be delisted and have all of its bugs fixed. There is too many to count. Not to mention some of the cut corners in this game. The dead bodies are all the same model, and it's not even the base player, it's some free model of a squid game player. Do not waste your time with this game. Lobbies are also full of toxic kids who say slurs and troll. Also as someone in the discord I don't like the creator in general. There is also tons of clear ai code in this game as well as the logo. If you're a developer like me, use this game as an example on how not to launch a game. Also don't bs me with "it's in beta stages" when bugs happen every game and make it unplayable. UPDATE: based on my personal encounters with him, the creator is a toxic scumbag.

reviews.review_title: The game is not in a good state
reviews.review_description: The game is not very good and you could very much tell they where trying to profit off the success of squid game before it died off I know this game is very early but even for an early game it should have not been released like this it’s barely playable and honestly they should have waited for season 3 to come out before releasing this please spend your time elsewhere￼ ￼

[VIRTUAL TRIALS]

The concept is tremendously creative and could be a big hit as a VR game. As much as I wanted to enjoy this game, it wasn’t even possible to play through it.

I highly respect the developers for their hard work and commitment towards this game. I understand that the community has been pressuring and toxic towards the hard working developers which wasn’t right at all.

All that aside, the game itself is just not it. When I tried  it it was bugged and no servers popped up. Eventually I finally joined a server and then for some reason during red light green light, only like 5 people weighed and no one could even get through the game.

The game is a highly ambitious project but it’s just simply incomplete. Clearly this needed more time to fix crucial game breaking bugs.

I can respect the fact that the developers are hard at work on these bugs at the moment, releasing an update almost everyday. But nonetheless, I still have to keep my one star review.

I will of course change my review once the game slowly starts getting fixed and becomes overall a better game.

developer_response.body:
Hello Dank01

Thank you for understanding and I promise to make sure the game is working and bug free as soon as possible!

-PHOZE
